/CAL: ACM ELIGIBLITY REPORT AND TO SET DISMISSAL/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD//CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/CTORD: SUBMIT TO A DRUG TEST WHEN DIRECTED TO DO SO BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/WEAP/CTORD: ENTER AND REMAIN IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AND RESIDE AT THE WARFIELD HOTEL/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: DISMISSAL/DOP/

/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT RETURN/DEF: IS 4011,5 TODAY AND UNABLE TO COME TO COURT/X: THE COURT ORDERS THE SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED/SHER/BAIL:25,000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD: CONFIRM DISM DATE OF 04-23-21/
